mapper.select:
SELECT id, parent_id, name, description, sort, created_at, updated_at FROM blog_category WHERE
parent_id IS NULL
parent_id = #{parentId}
AND name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_category (parent_id, name, description, sort) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{sort})
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.name, c.description, c.sort, c.created_at, c.updated_at, COUNT(p.id) AS post_count FROM blog_category c LEFT JOIN blog_post p ON c.id = p.category_id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY c.id, c.parent_id, c.name, c.description, c.sort, c.created_at, c.updated_at ORDER BY c.sort ASC, c.id DESC
